cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So the problem is about Jane's birthday and finding a date 10 days before that. Let me start by breaking down the information given. First, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Wait, February's last day is usually the 28th, unless it's a leap year when it's the 29th. But 2001 isn't a leap year, right? Leap years are every 4 years, like 2000, 2004, etc. So 2001 isn't a leap year, so the last day of February would be February 28, 2001. So Jane's birthday is 02/28.
